title: Sunday Morning Worship
description: Join us for our regular Sunday morning worship service. Powerful worship, anointed preaching, and genuine community.

title: Wednesday Bible Study
description: Dig deeper into the Word. Fellowship starts at 6:30 PM, adult Bible study at 7:00 PM.

title: Youth Night
description: Ages 13–19. Worship, the Word, and real community for the next generation.
